channel.title: Nishok's Kural & Cloud
channel.description: Engineering blog covering SRE, AI/ML, Tamil literature, and cloud infrastructure by Nishok VG.

item.title: Shipping Villi Bharatam RAG Live — From Local Pipeline to Hugging Face Spaces
item.description: We took our 11,999-chunk Tamil RAG pipeline live on Hugging Face Spaces — added the missing Drona Parva, fixed cross-lingual retrieval that was silently failing on English queries, and debugged every layer from Tesseract OCR to Cohere reranking thresholds.

item.title: From Manual RAG to LangGraph + Cohere + RAGAS — What the Numbers Proved
item.description: We rebuilt Villi Bharatam RAG from scratch using LangChain EnsembleRetriever, a LangGraph stateful pipeline, Cohere cross-encoder reranking, and RAGAS evaluation — then measured the difference. Faithfulness went from 0.000 to 0.889. Latency dropped 1.8x.

item.title: Accelerating Enterprise EKS Deployments with Claude Code
item.description: How we built a production-grade MicroStrategy EKS platform from scratch — EKS v1.33, Karpenter, RDS, Istio, and a deeply nested Terragrunt architecture — using Claude Code as an active engineering partner.

item.title: Building RAG on a 2177-Page Tamil Epic — Every Mistake, Every Fix
item.description: A complete technical walkthrough of building production RAG on Villi Bharatam — from garbled Bamini font encoding to hybrid retrieval, Pydantic AI structured outputs, and a 10,370-chunk Chroma index.

item.title: I Tried to Build a RAG Chatbot for a 15th-Century Tamil Epic — Here's What Broke
item.description: A war story about Bamini font encoding, colored ink as a secret API, OpenRouter timeouts, and what 2177 pages of a Tamil epic taught me about retrieval-augmented generation.

item.title: Building an HR Chatbot with RAG — From PDF to Answers in 3 Steps
item.description: A practical walkthrough of building a production-style HR Q&A bot: ingest PDFs, chunk and embed them, search with FAISS, and generate cited answers with GPT-4o-mini.

item.title: Day 10: RAG - Retrieval Augmented Generation
item.description: Building an end-to-end RAG pipeline using cosine similarity and FAISS for scalable vector search.

item.title: We Let AI Write Our Infrastructure Code — And It Killed Our Deployment Failures
item.description: A war story about circular dependencies, zombie ENIs, and how Claude Code + a two-tier EKS refactor took us from 60% to 98% first-try deployments.
